creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2011-08-02 00:54:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/rednotebook Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  RedNotebook is a modern journal written by python. It includes
  a calendar navigation, customizable templates, export functionality
  and word clouds. You can also format, tag and search your entries.
  RedNotebook is Free Software under the GPL.
  
  WWW: http://rednotebook.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/159339
  Submitted by:   Hon-Yu Lawrence Cheung <cheunghonyu@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.438     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/deskutils/rednotebook/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/deskutils/rednotebook/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/deskutils/rednotebook/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +397 -0    ports/deskutils/rednotebook/pkg-plist (new)
